type_suggestions.display: serif/editorial such as Fraunces, Lora, or Source Serif 4
type_suggestions.body: clean humanist sans such as Inter, Atkinson Hyperlegible, or Nunito Sans
type_suggestions.handwritten: optional accent font such as Caveat or Patrick Hand

texture_notes: Use subtle paper grain, ruled notebook lines, low-opacity dashed arrows, tape tabs, and small imperfect rotations.
